input.background: Ninety and 95 percent confidence intervals for the alcohol and esophageal cancer illustrative case-control data are calculated.
input.question: Calculate the natural logarithm of the estimated odds ratio (OR).

case_status.description: Indicates whether the individual is a case (esophageal cancer) or a control (no esophageal cancer).

alcohol_exposure.description: Indicates whether the individual has been exposed to alcohol consumption or not.

odds_ratio.value: Estimated odds ratio calculated from case-control data.
odds_ratio.description: The odds ratio quantifies the association between alcohol exposure and esophageal cancer.

log_odds_ratio.value: Natural logarithm of the estimated odds ratio.
log_odds_ratio.description: The natural logarithm of the odds ratio, used for statistical analysis and interpretation.

meta_info.caption: Confidence interval for the odds ratio (Alcohol and  esophageal cancer).
